messages.content: You triage Driftwood (a SaaS task-tracker) support tickets. Reply with ONLY a JSON object with keys: category (string), priority (low|medium|high|urgent), sentiment (negative|neutral|positive), needs_human (boolean), draft_reply (string). No prose, no code fences.

Subject: Please add a Gantt / timeline view

Our PM workflow really needs a timeline view with dependencies between tasks. Boards are great for daily work but planning a quarter on them is painful.

response.content: {"category":"feature_request","priority":"low","sentiment":"neutral","needs_human":false,"draft_reply":"Thanks for reaching out about feature request — we're on it and will follow up shortly."}
